inputs.label: Recommended Daily Allowance (RDA)
inputs.businessContext: The recommended dietary intake for the vitamin (e.g., Vitamin C).

businessContext_i18n.en: The recommended dietary intake for the vitamin (e.g., Vitamin C).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vitamin (örn. C Vitamini) için önerilen diyet alımı.

inputs.label: Food 1 Servings
inputs.businessContext: Number of servings consumed from food source 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of servings consumed from food source 1.

inputs.label: Vitamin per Serving (Food 1)
inputs.businessContext: Vitamin content per serving for food 1.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vitamin content per serving for food 1.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besin 1 için porsiyon başına vitamin içeriği.

inputs.label: Food 2 Servings
inputs.businessContext: Number of servings consumed from food source 2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of servings consumed from food source 2.

inputs.label: Vitamin per Serving (Food 2)
inputs.businessContext: Vitamin content per serving for food 2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vitamin content per serving for food 2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besin 2 için porsiyon başına vitamin içeriği.

inputs.label: Food 3 Servings
inputs.businessContext: Number of servings consumed from food source 3.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of servings consumed from food source 3.

inputs.label: Vitamin per Serving (Food 3)

businessContext_i18n.en: Vitamin content per serving for food 3.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Besin 3 için porsiyon başına vitamin içeriği.

formulas.totalVitaminIntake: food1Servings * food1VitPerServing + food2Servings * food2VitPerServing + food3Servings * food3VitPerServing

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
